---
title: "Xiangtao Xu"
subtitle: "Principal Investigator"
image: /images/portraits/placeholder.svg
role: pi          # informational tag only (current vs alumni is decided by folder)
weight: 1         # controls card order among current members (lower = first)
about:
  template: trestles      # nice profile layout: photo on the side, bio + links
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:xx286@cornell.edu"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/xiangtaoxu"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=fAorsowAAAAJ"
---

Xiangtao is an assistant professor in Ecology and Evolutionary Biology at Cornell.
His research links plant ecophysiology, ecosystem modeling, and ecological remote
sensing to predict terrestrial biosphere dynamics from the individual tree to the
landscape.
